calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS LLC, ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR CO, OF SAN FRANCISCO LLC DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Robert Hester, Esq., of Gomerman | Bourn & Associates, (415) 545-8608, for Plaintiffs.

Adam I. Miller, Esq., of Miller Miller Gerber LLP, (714) 450-3800, for Defendant EAN Holdings, LLP erroneously sued and served as EAN Holdings LLP, and Enterprise Rent-A-Car Co of San Francisco, LLC.

The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After hearing, an order is executed.
